chunks.text: Tiffany Reardon receives Chancellor's Outstanding Staff Award - EECS at Berkeley Tiffany Reardon, Associate Director of EECS Diversity and Achievement, has been selected to receive the 2015 Chancellor’s Outstanding Staff Award . This is the highest honor bestowed upon staff by the Chancellor, in recognition of individuals and teams who, in addition to performing all their normal job duties with excellence, also demonstrate exceptional initiative in contributing to the UC Berkeley campus community. Tiffany has worked collaboratively across EECS to foster an inclusive and supportive community for students and staff, and has been a major factor in our successful efforts to increase student diversity in our undergraduate and graduate programs. Categories Diversity Honors View Open Faculty Positions
